MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-30-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Stan Bair, Clerk: Felicia Green, Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
David Kim, authorized agent, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Community Housing Partnership.
Attorney, Michael S. Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant, Leland Mackey a.k.a. Leland Mackey, Jr. is present.
Attorney, Tyler Macmillan representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case settled, the trial date of AUG-03-2009 is vacated.
